title: swtpm init: process-global setenv is thread-unsafe and duplicated
description: Both wolftpm/src/device.rs (Device::open_swtpm) and wolftpm-tss/src/connection.rs (WolfTpmSwtpm::connect) set SWTPM_SERVER_NAME/SWTPM_SERVER_PORT via setenv, call wolfTPM2_Init, then unsetenv. This is: (1) process-global and thread-unsafe -- two concurrent calls race on the env vars; (2) duplicated between the two crates with no shared helper; (3) an API design that cannot be fixed without a breaking change once users depend on these constructors. The correct fix is to use a process-wide mutex, but that is a breaking internal change. Documents a known landmine for future parallelism.
